last_task.subject: Can you research the last 12 hours of completed tasks by Arc and email me a summary of everything that happened? can be very concise just looking to understand what happened overnight as we have a large volume of tasks and I want to make sure it's all legitimate. I also want to know why 2 of my emails went unanswered, and why Arc's web UI is missing features we implemented before (voice, layout changes, and more)
